dynasty.name: 汉朝
dynasty.description: 中国历史上第二个大一统王朝，分为西汉与东汉两个时期

locations.name: 司隶校尉部
locations.historicalSignificance: 汉代京畿重地，包含都城长安与洛阳

modernMatch.name: 西安市
modernMatch.notes: 司隶校尉部范围涵盖今陕西中部及河南西部

children.name: 京兆尹
children.description: 西汉都城所在，三辅之一

children.name: 长安
children.historicalSignificance: 丝绸之路起点，当时世界最大城市之一

children.name: 左冯翊
children.description: 三辅之一，位于长安以东

children.name: 高陵
children.historicalSignificance: 汉代三辅重县

children.name: 右扶风
children.description: 三辅之一，位于长安以西

children.name: 槐里
children.description: 右扶风治所，马超故里附近
children.historicalSignificance: 汉代右扶风重镇，武帝建章宫所在

children.name: 河南尹
children.historicalSignificance: 东汉国都洛阳所在，天下之中

children.name: 洛阳
children.description: 东汉国都，光武帝定都于此
children.historicalSignificance: 东汉政治中心，丝绸之路东方起点

children.name: 河东郡
children.description: 位于黄河以东，盐铁重地

children.name: 安邑
children.description: 河东郡治所，古魏国都城
children.historicalSignificance: 产盐重地，汉代经济要地

locations.name: 豫州
locations.description: 位于中原腹地，天下之中
locations.historicalSignificance: 豫州为古九州之一，汉代人口稠密之区

modernMatch.name: 许昌市
modernMatch.notes: 豫州范围涵盖今河南东部及安徽北部

children.name: 颍川郡
children.historicalSignificance: 汉代文化重镇，荀彧、陈寔等名士故里

children.name: 许
children.description: 颍川郡治所，曹操迎献帝之都
children.historicalSignificance: 东汉末年汉献帝迁都于此

children.name: 汝南郡
children.description: 人口大郡，汉代望族荟萃之地
children.historicalSignificance: 袁绍家族四世三公，出于汝南

children.name: 平舆
children.historicalSignificance: 袁氏家族根基所在

children.name: 梁国
children.description: 西汉梁王封地，文化繁盛

children.name: 沛国
children.historicalSignificance: 刘邦故里，汉代龙兴之地

children.name: 沛
children.historicalSignificance: 刘邦曾任泗水亭长，此处为汉朝龙兴之地

children.name: 陈国
children.description: 古陈国故地，伏羲神农遗迹所在

locations.name: 兖州
locations.description: 古九州之一，位于中原东部
locations.historicalSignificance: 曹操起家之地，汉代军事要地

modernMatch.name: 济宁市
modernMatch.notes: 兖州范围涵盖今山东西南部及河南东部

children.name: 陈留郡
children.description: 东汉末年曹操起兵之地
children.historicalSignificance: 曹操在陈留散尽家财起兵讨董卓

children.name: 陈留
children.description: 陈留郡治所，曹操起兵之地
children.historicalSignificance: 曹操在此起兵讨伐董卓

children.name: 泰山郡
children.historicalSignificance: 帝王封禅之地，汉代文化名山

children.name: 山阳郡
children.description: 兖州要郡，东汉末年战乱频发

locations.name: 徐州
locations.description: 古九州之一，位于东方沿海
locations.historicalSignificance: 兵家必争之地，东汉末年陶谦、刘备、吕布、曹操反复争夺

modernMatch.name: 徐州市
modernMatch.notes: 徐州范围涵盖今山东东南部及江苏北部

children.name: 琅邪郡
children.historicalSignificance: 诸葛氏家族故里，琅邪王氏发源地

children.name: 琅邪
children.description: 琅邪郡治所，诸葛亮故里
children.historicalSignificance: 诸葛亮少年时居于此

children.name: 彭城国
children.historicalSignificance: 项羽建都于此，楚汉相争核心区域

children.name: 彭城
children.description: 项羽建都之地，四战之地
children.historicalSignificance: 楚汉相争主战场，项羽都城

children.name: 下邳国
children.description: 徐州要地，三国时吕布殒命之处

locations.name: 青州
locations.description: 古九州之一，东方沿海富庶之地
locations.historicalSignificance: 春秋齐国故地，盐铁发达

modernMatch.name: 淄博市
modernMatch.notes: 青州范围涵盖今山东北部及东部

children.name: 齐郡
children.description: 春秋齐国故地，经济发达
children.historicalSignificance: 汉代丝织业中心，盐铁之利甲天下

children.name: 临淄
children.description: 齐国故都，汉代五都之一
children.historicalSignificance: 春秋战国齐国都城，汉代丝织业重镇

children.name: 平原郡
children.historicalSignificance: 刘备早期任职之地

children.name: 北海郡
children.historicalSignificance: 建安七子之一孔融治理之地

children.name: 东莱郡
children.description: 山东半岛东端，濒临大海

locations.name: 凉州
locations.description: 西北边陲，丝绸之路要道
locations.historicalSignificance: 河西走廊所在，连接中原与西域的通道

modernMatch.name: 武威市
modernMatch.notes: 凉州范围涵盖今甘肃、宁夏及青海东部

children.name: 陇西郡
children.historicalSignificance: 秦人发祥之地，李广故里

children.name: 狄道
children.description: 陇西郡治所，秦长城西端起点
children.historicalSignificance: 秦长城西端起点，汉代西北军事重镇

children.name: 天水郡
children.historicalSignificance: 三国姜维故里，诸葛亮北伐要地

children.name: 冀
children.historicalSignificance: 三国姜维出生之地

children.name: 武威郡
children.historicalSignificance: 霍去病击匈奴后设郡，丝路重镇

children.name: 姑臧
children.description: 武威郡治所，凉州刺史驻地
children.historicalSignificance: 河西走廊最大城市，丝路商贸中心

children.name: 张掖郡
children.description: 河西走廊中部，断匈奴右臂
children.historicalSignificance: 霍去病征服河西后设郡

children.name: 酒泉郡
children.historicalSignificance: 传说霍去病倾酒入泉而得名

children.name: 敦煌郡
children.description: 丝路西端重镇，通往西域门户
children.historicalSignificance: 丝绸之路重要节点，莫高窟所在

children.name: 敦煌
children.historicalSignificance: 汉代通往西域的门户，张骞出使西域经此

locations.name: 并州
locations.description: 北方边防重地，抗击匈奴前线
locations.historicalSignificance: 汉代抵御匈奴南侵的军事前沿

modernMatch.name: 太原市
modernMatch.notes: 并州范围涵盖今山西省大部及内蒙古南部

children.name: 太原郡
children.historicalSignificance: 汉代北方军事经济中心

children.name: 晋阳
children.description: 太原郡治所，并州刺史驻地
children.historicalSignificance: 并州政治中心，汉代北方重镇

children.name: 雁门郡
children.description: 北防匈奴要塞，雁门关所在
children.historicalSignificance: 李广、卫青等名将曾在此抗击匈奴

children.name: 代郡
children.description: 北方边郡，汉匈交战前线

children.name: 上党郡
children.description: 高居太行之上，地势险要
children.historicalSignificance: 长平之战发生地附近，战略要地

children.name: 云中郡
children.description: 河套地区，卫青出击匈奴始发地
children.historicalSignificance: 卫青率军自云中出击匈奴，收复河套

locations.name: 冀州
locations.description: 古九州之一，北方人口稠密之区
locations.historicalSignificance: 袁绍、曹操争霸之地，汉代经济发达区域

modernMatch.name: 邢台市
modernMatch.notes: 冀州范围涵盖今河北中南部

children.name: 魏郡
children.description: 冀州核心，曹操封地所在
children.historicalSignificance: 曹操被封为魏公、魏王，封地在此

children.name: 邺
children.description: 魏郡治所，曹操封魏王后之都
children.historicalSignificance: 曹操实际政治中心，铜雀台所在

children.name: 钜鹿郡
children.historicalSignificance: 张角创立太平道，黄巾起义爆发之地

children.name: 钜鹿
children.description: 钜鹿郡治所，黄巾起义爆发地
children.historicalSignificance: 张角钜鹿起事，黄巾之乱始于此

children.name: 常山郡
children.historicalSignificance: 三国名将赵云故里

children.name: 真定
children.historicalSignificance: 赵云自称常山赵子龙

children.name: 中山国
children.description: 刘备自称中山靖王之后
children.historicalSignificance: 中山靖王刘胜封国，刘备自称其后裔

children.name: 渤海郡
children.description: 濒临渤海，东方盐业重地

locations.name: 幽州
locations.historicalSignificance: 公孙瓒、刘虞割据之地，抵御北方游牧民族前沿

modernMatch.name: 北京市
modernMatch.notes: 幽州范围涵盖今北京、天津、河北北部及辽宁

children.name: 涿郡
children.historicalSignificance: 蜀汉昭烈帝刘备故里

children.name: 涿
children.historicalSignificance: 桃园三结义故事发生地

children.name: 蓟
children.description: 广阳郡治所，幽州刺史驻地
children.historicalSignificance: 燕国故都，汉代幽州政治中心

children.name: 渔阳郡
children.historicalSignificance: 彭宠据渔阳反光武帝

children.name: 辽西郡
children.description: 辽河以西，通往东北要道

children.name: 辽东郡
children.description: 辽东半岛，公孙氏割据之地
children.historicalSignificance: 公孙度家族割据辽东数十年

children.name: 辽东
children.description: 辽东郡治所，公孙氏割据中心
children.historicalSignificance: 公孙度、公孙康割据辽东的中心

locations.name: 益州
locations.historicalSignificance: 刘备建立蜀汉之地，诸葛亮鞠躬尽瘁之所

modernMatch.name: 成都市
modernMatch.notes: 益州范围涵盖今四川、重庆、云南、贵州及陕西南部

children.name: 汉中郡
children.description: 入蜀门户，刘邦发迹之地
children.historicalSignificance: 刘邦为汉王时都南郑，后以此为基地夺取天下

children.name: 南郑
children.description: 汉中郡治所，刘邦为汉王之都
children.historicalSignificance: 刘邦受封汉王后之都城，汉朝国号源于此

children.name: 巴郡
children.historicalSignificance: 巴人故地，入蜀要道

children.name: 江州
children.historicalSignificance: 巴国故都，汉代西南军事重镇

children.name: 蜀郡
children.description: 天府之国核心，成都所在
children.historicalSignificance: 都江堰灌溉千里，蜀锦名扬天下

children.name: 成都
children.historicalSignificance: 蜀锦产地，刘备定都之地，蜀汉国都

children.name: 牂牁郡
children.historicalSignificance: 汉武帝开西南夷后设郡

locations.name: 荆州
locations.historicalSignificance: 三国争夺焦点，赤壁之战、夷陵之战皆在此

modernMatch.name: 荆州市
modernMatch.notes: 荆州范围涵盖今湖北、湖南大部

children.name: 南阳郡
children.description: 东汉第一大郡，光武帝故乡
children.historicalSignificance: 光武帝刘秀故乡，东汉南都

children.name: 宛
children.historicalSignificance: 东汉光武帝龙兴之地，商业繁华

children.name: 南郡
children.description: 荆州核心，长江中游要地
children.historicalSignificance: 关羽大意失荆州即此

children.name: 江陵
children.historicalSignificance: 楚国故都纪南城附近，关羽镇守荆州之中心

children.name: 江夏郡
children.historicalSignificance: 黄祖镇守江夏，孙权屡攻不下

children.name: 零陵郡
children.historicalSignificance: 刘备取荆南四郡之一

children.name: 桂阳郡
children.description: 荆南四郡之一，赵云曾领桂阳太守
children.historicalSignificance: 赵云代赵范领桂阳太守

children.name: 长沙郡
children.description: 荆南四郡之一，南方重镇
children.historicalSignificance: 孙坚曾任长沙太守，讨伐黄巾

children.name: 长沙
children.historicalSignificance: 孙坚起家之地，马王堆汉墓所在

children.name: 武陵郡
children.description: 荆南四郡之一，陶渊明桃花源记所在

locations.name: 扬州
locations.description: 东南大州，江东孙氏基业所在
locations.historicalSignificance: 孙吴立国之基，六朝古都金陵所在

modernMatch.name: 南京市
modernMatch.notes: 扬州范围涵盖今安徽、江苏南部、浙江、福建及江西

children.name: 庐江郡
children.historicalSignificance: 周瑜故里，孙吴名将辈出之地

children.name: 九江郡
children.historicalSignificance: 袁术称帝于寿春

children.name: 寿春
children.description: 九江郡治所，袁术称帝之地
children.historicalSignificance: 袁术在此僭越称帝，后兵败身亡

children.name: 会稽郡
children.description: 东南大郡，越王勾践故地
children.historicalSignificance: 春秋越国故地，孙策渡江取会稽

children.name: 会稽
children.description: 会稽郡治所，越王勾践卧薪尝胆之地
children.historicalSignificance: 春秋越国故都，王羲之兰亭集会之地

children.name: 丹阳郡
children.description: 孙吴发祥之地，精兵产地
children.historicalSignificance: 丹阳兵天下精锐，孙吴立国根基

children.name: 南昌
children.historicalSignificance: 灌婴筑南昌城，汉代江南重镇

children.name: 吴郡
children.description: 江东核心，孙吴龙兴之地
children.historicalSignificance: 孙坚家族籍贯所在，江东基业起点

children.name: 吴
children.description: 吴郡治所，春秋吴国故都
children.historicalSignificance: 春秋吴国故地，孙吴基业起点

locations.name: 交州
locations.historicalSignificance: 赵佗南越国故地，汉武帝平南越后设州

modernMatch.name: 广州市
modernMatch.notes: 交州范围涵盖今广东、广西及越南北部

children.name: 南海郡
children.historicalSignificance: 赵佗建南越国都城番禺所在

children.name: 番禺
children.historicalSignificance: 赵佗建南越国之都城，汉代南海贸易中心

children.name: 苍梧郡
children.historicalSignificance: 赵佗南越国重镇

children.name: 交趾郡
children.historicalSignificance: 汉代最南端行政区，士燮治理之地

children.name: 日南郡
children.historicalSignificance: 汉代版图最南端的行政区划
